generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that over 60% of European allies still rely on US-made defense systems? While strategic autonomy sounds good in theory, rushing to cut ties could leave us vulnerable. Let's focus on gradual, responsible modernization that keeps our security intact. #StrongerTogether #SmartAutonomy
